| Team,

The 2020 election is ramping up FAST, and we have to be prepared for anything.

National Republicans have their hearts set on defeating Ed. They want to replace Ed's progressive voice with a Trump look-a-like who will stand beside Mitch McConnell and demolish any Democratic proposal that reaches the Senate.

But Ed knows that with our grassroots team, we can overcome the right-wing attacks and win for our progressive values.

We're going to set a new record for online support for Ed this month, and we need 54 more donations to come in before midnight to stay on track.

Ed needs help from progressive likes you from across the country. Your donation will help keep a progressive voice in the Senate to fight for us. _**[Can Ed count on you to pitch in $7 or more before midnight to help fight for our progressive values?](http://ma.edmarkey. name: Kirsten Gillibrand (personal)
subject: Missed yesterday's goal
body:
We're extending the deadline by a few hours.
Peter, I need your help. I wanted us to hit 1,000 new donors by midnight last night, but we didn't hit that goal. So we've extended the deadline into today so I could ask for your help. Donating today will help power us past this goal and could make the difference toward hitting our May fundraising goals. **237 more donors to go --[please, donate in these few extra hours before the final deadline to help power this people-first campaign to defeat Trump and guarantee my spot on the debate stage. No corporate PACs, no fossil fuel companies, no federal lobbyists, no super PAC--I'm counting on you right now.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97730c/2ae112ef/68d0e2a8/357c7d52/1830405803/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMxMDctZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3107-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

Thanks so much,
Kirsten

Peter,
Kirsten emailed you yesterday setting a fundraising goal for us for this weekend: 1,000 new donors by midnight tonight.
Right now, we're a bit behind that goal, but I think we can turn it around before I report back to KG.
Will you help us get back on track? **[Donate right now to help hit today's goal, guarantee Kirsten is on the debate stage and power this campaign forward to defeat Trump.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97730c/2ae112ef/68d0e2a8/357c7d52/1830405803/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMxMDctZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3107-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

---
| [Donate another amount](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97730c/2ae112ef/68d0e2a8/357c7d52/1830405803/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMxMDctZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3107-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

We have a steep uphill climb ahead of us, but hitting our goal and having you on board means this: Kirsten can campaign in more early states. She's heading to Iowa for the next _three weekends in a row_ to pound the pavement--because when she gets in a room with people, she can win hearts and minds. I've seen it, and it's how we're going to win this thing: voter by voter, coffee shop by coffee shop.
We can spread our message even further by **[securing Kirsten's spot on the national debate stage](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97730c/2ae112ef/68d0e2a8/357c7d52/1830405803/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMxMDctZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3107-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****[.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97730c/2ae112ef/68d0e2a8/357c7d52/1830405803/VEsP/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMxMDctZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3107-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")** With 23 declared candidates now in the race, we need to pull out all the stops to absolutely guarantee Kirsten will be on that stage.
It all has to start now. It has to start with you chipping in to hit our goal and power this movement. **[We need 572 more people to become donors by midnight tonight--and every donation gets Kirsten one step closer to the debate stage. No corporate PACs, no federal lobbyists, no super PACs--we're counting on you.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f97730c/2ae112ef/68d0e2a8/357c7d52/1830405803/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azMxMDctZnItZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk3107-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for being brave with us,

Jess

Jess Fassler
Campaign Manager
Gillibrand 2020

subject: Donald Trump just announced:

body:
BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Ben Ray needs 10,000 signatures on his emergency petition to STOP this assault on our public lands. >>
---
| | **BREAKING: TRUMP RELEASES PLAN TO THREATEN OUR PUBLIC LANDS** | **10,000 EMERGENCY SIGNATURES NEEDED:** We're sick to our stomachs. President Trump just released a new plan to decimate our public lands.

**His plan will absolutely devastate the preservation of our most precious, sacred, and majestic lands.** **_[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Ben Ray needs 10,000 signatures on his emergency petition to STOP this assault on our public lands. >> ](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b565/18e32a7f/5b09eaa5/7b9fb27a/2816729929/VEsH/ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/environmental-survey?source=20190519_em_pet_b1_stpv_all")_**
---

It's no secret.

Climate change poses a dangerous threat. We're not doing enough to stop it. And the effects are becoming more devastating and severe by the day.

Toxic chemicals. Water contamination. Air pollution. Earthquakes.

Yet even still, President Trump just proposed a new plan that would devastate the preservation of our most precious, sacred, and majestic lands.

**Ben Ray has long fought to protect our land, air, and water for future generations -- but this fight is too big for one person.**

[_**He 's counting on 10,000 signatures before midnight calling for an end to this attack on our public lands. Will you add your critical signature and help Ben Ray protect our beautiful country for generations to come? >> **_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b565/18e32a7f/5b09eaa5/7b9fb27a/2816729929/VEsE/ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/environmental-survey?source=20190519_em_pet_b1_stpv_all")

He's counting on you.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Val_Beck_=28John=E2=80=99s_Scheduler=29?=
subject: Are you free to meet John?
body:
Chip in now to be automatically entered for a chance to meet me on the campaign trail for a beer and an in-depth conversation at a local brewery--travel and hotel included. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771657/691c9bd/6c72faad/11a4f9f0/3045320982/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-65kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Hi there, I'm John's scheduler. That means wherever John goes on this campaign--to Des Moines to meet with small business owners, to Charleston to meet with faith communities, or Chicago to speak on foreign policy--I'm the one who organizes the plan, marks it on his calendar, and keeps him on track.

Now, I'm hoping to see your name on that calendar.

**We 're holding a contest to win a trip to meet John on the campaign trail for beers and a brewery tour--and since I love keeping an eye on time, here's a heads up: it ends tomorrow. Chip in any amount now to be automatically entered for a chance to win!** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771657/691c9bd/6c72faad/11a4f9f1/3045320982/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-grab-a-beer-with-john?refcode=em_fr_20190519_VB_20190519-fr-VB-contest-all_all_contribbutton&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I've worked with John for 10 years--from his time as mayor, to the Colorado State House and now on his campaign for president. Over those years I've gotten to know John not just as a boss and a leader, but as a person. He even married my husband Sam and me, and has been a wonderful--and fun--friend to both of my girls since they were born.

Life has certainly changed, but John hasn't: He is still the imaginative entrepreneur/brewer who loves nothing more than spending quality time with all kinds of people, having long, in-depth conversations.

**He has said to me countless times that what he loves most about this campaign is the opportunity to get to know people like you.** And I can't wait to carve out time for the winners of this contest to sit down with John over a drink and share ideas about how to move America forward.

[**_There 's just one day left to enter. Don't miss out on a chance to spend time with John talking about what matters most for our kids' future and our country--and do it over a cold beer. Enter now._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771657/691c9bd/6c72faad/11a4f9ee/3045320982/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-grab-a-beer-with-john?refcode=em_fr_20190519_VB_20190519-fr-VB-contest-all_all_l1&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Cheers, and as we say around here...GIDDY UP!
Val

Val Beck
Scheduler
Hickenlooper 2020 **[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771657/691c9bd/6c72faad/11a4f9ef/3045320982/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-grab-a-beer-with-john?refcode=em_fr_20190519_VB_20190519-fr-VB-contest-all_all_contribbutton2&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win. Contributing will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by **May 21st, 2019**. Enter by contributing [**_here_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771657/691c9bd/6c72faad/11a4f9ec/3045320982/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-grab-a-beer-with-john?source=rd_contestsignup"), or click [**_here_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771657/691c9bd/6c72faad/11a4f9ed/3045320982/VEsA/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/meet-john-on-the-campaign-trail") to enter without contributing. Three (3) winners will receive the following prize: **Round trip travel to the event city, one (1) night hotel accommodations, one (1) brewery tour, and one (1) meal with drinks** (approximate retail value of prize: **$1,500**). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. All prizes will be awarded. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 21 or older. Promotion subject to [**_Official Rules_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771657/691c9bd/6c72faad/11a4f9ea/3045320982/VEsB/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/content/have-a-beer-with-hickenlooper-contest-rules/") and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hickenlooper 2020, PO Box 6377, Denver, CO 80206.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: My plan to shut the revolving door between giant contractors and the Pentagon -- and more:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
It's past time to cut our bloated defense budget and address a big hunk of the root cause: corruption. Here's my plan to fight back. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fa57/45c30650/99335ed4/66996ff9/851125603/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
| **We wanted to make sure you saw this: Elizabeth has a new plan to crack down on corruption in the Department of Defense.

Add your name to say you support it:**

| [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fa57/45c30650/99335ed4/66996ff8/851125603/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMTgzMjYiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTE5ZW0xLXYxczIifQ==/ "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-militaryethics?source=20190519em1-v1s2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&zip=18326")
---

Let me tell you why I went to Northern Virginia last week.

I hosted a town hall not too far away from the Pentagon -- and not too far away from the big, shiny offices of the biggest defense contractors.

It's no surprise that these companies have clustered around the Pentagon, sometimes within walking distance.

At our town hall, we talked about a real problem: Too many of our defense contractors don't just want a seat at the table. They want to own the table.

**Coziness between defense lobbyists, Congress, and the Pentagon -- what Dwight D. Eisenhower called the military-industrial complex -- tilts countless decisions, big and small, away from legitimate national security interests and toward the desires of giant corporations that thrive off taxpayer dollars.

I've got a plan to fix it: My new Department of Defense Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act. **It would shut the revolving door between giant contractors and the Pentagon, ban DoD officials from owning contractor stock, limit foreign government hiring of American national security officials, and expose defense contractor lobbying.

**[Add your name to become a citizen co-sponsor. Help show Washington that there's a grassroots movement ready to fight against corruption.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fa57/45c30650/99335ed4/66996ff8/851125603/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMTgzMjYiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTE5ZW0xLXYxczIifQ==/ "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-militaryethics?source=20190519em1-v1s2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&zip=18326")**

Defense contractor influence is a big part of how we ended up with a Pentagon budget that'll cost more this year than we'll spend on education, medical research, housing, disaster relief -- everything else in the discretionary budget put together.

It's past time to cut our bloated defense budget and address a big hunk of the root cause: corruption. Here's my plan to fight back:

**1\. Slam Shut the Revolving Door Between Giant Contractors and the Pentagon.**

My plan would ban giant defense contractors from hiring senior DoD officials and generals and flag officers for four years after they leave the Department. It would also require contractors to identify the former DoD officials who work for them and what they're working on. To fully eliminate the opportunity for conflicts of interest, a former employee or executive of a defense contractor who joins the government would be totally banned from working on anything that could influence their former bosses.

**2\. Ban DoD Officials from Owning Contractor Stock.**

This one is a no-brainer. My plan would ban all senior DoD officials from owning or trading any stock of giant defense contractors. And it would ban all DoD employees from owning or trading stock if they're in a position to influence that contractor's bottom line.

**3\. Limit Foreign Government Hiring of American National Security Officials.**

Former senior national security officials shouldn't get paid big bucks to work for foreign governments -- especially when that work undermines U.S. interests. My plan would make it illegal.

**4\. Expose Defense Contractor Lobbying.**

Defense contractors should be required to disclose the true scope of their lobbying activities -- including who they're meeting with at the DoD, what they're lobbying about, and what (unclassified) information they're sharing. And federal open records laws should apply to private defense contractors so the public can understand what they're doing.

this fight is personal for me. All three of my brothers went off to join the military because, like tens of thousands of uniformed and civilian employees and officers at the Defense Department, they wanted to serve their country.

We should all be grateful for that kind of service and sacrifice. You know how we can demonstrate that gratitude? **Let's make sure that national security decisions are driven only by what best keeps Americans safe. Not by private profits. Not by foreign interests.**

**[I'll keep fighting to crack down on corruption in every corner of Washington, but I can't do it alone. Will you add your name to become a citizen co-sponsor of our new Department of Defense Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852fa57/45c30650/99335ed4/66996ff8/851125603/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMTgzMjYiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjIwMTkwNTE5ZW0xLXYxczIifQ==/ "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-militaryethics?source=20190519em1-v1s2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&zip=18326")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

Look, we couldn't agree more.

Donald Trump has managed to rack up a MULTI-TRILLION dollar deficit during a period of low unemployment in the country. _It 's almost impossible to do that!_

Even worse, he's incited a trade war with China which has put the livelihood of our farmers and ranchers on the line.

Farm incomes are on track to be down $12 BILLION this year, corn and soybean prices have plummeted, and farm bankruptcies are near record levels in many regions.

Michael knows that putting tariffs on the Chinese is actually putting taxes on American producers, farmers, consumers, and workers.

It's completely the wrong way of doing this.

name: Joe Biden
subject: The Affordable Care Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Every single day, I was proud to serve as your Vice President -- but never more than the day the Affordable Care Act was signed. | Peter,

Every single day, I was proud to serve as your Vice President -- but never more than the day the Affordable Care Act was signed.

When it was finally enacted into law, you might remember I told President Obama it was a big deal - _or words to that effect._ And it was.

**The Affordable Care Act extended health insurance to an additional 20 million people by the time President Obama and I left office. And, because of that law, tens of millions of people with pre-existing conditions no longer have to be worried about being denied coverage.** [Now we have to finish the job and make health care a right for all and not a privilege for the few, and give everyone the peace of mind they deserve.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319bb3/1cd0ac28/3b55b8b6/356b4a2d/1760887521/VEsH/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Protect-the-ACA?source=email-bsd-20190519ACA-b2_PET_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190519ACA&utm_content=b2_PET_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1")

But instead of doing more to expand access to quality, affordable health care, Republicans have been steadily working to dismantle the ACA to devastating effect.

In recent weeks, the CDC released a survey that reveals about 30.4 million Americans did not have health insurance in 2018, up from 29.3 million in 2017. **That means about 1.1 million more Americans were uninsured last year compared to the year before.**

**We can 't let this be the new normal. Help me reach 50,000 signatures standing to defend and then boldly build upon the Affordable Care Act:** | | [**SIGN THE PETITION >>**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319bb3/1cd0ac28/3b55b8b6/356b4a2d/1760887521/VEsE/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Protect-the-ACA?source=email-bsd-20190519ACA-b2_PET_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190519ACA&utm_content=b2_PET_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1")
---
Let's not kid one another: This is a concerted effort by Congressional Republicans and Donald Trump. And if they win in 2020, they're coming after not only the Affordable Care Act but also Medicare and Medicaid and Social Security. They've said so.

But we can't afford to go backwards on this. Millions of Americans need to have the right to health care.

How can a person's dignity be maintained if they can't afford to care for a sick child or a family member because of a pre-existing condition - or because they've reached a point where their health insurer says "no more?"

We've got to finish the job on health care, Peter.

**If you agree, can you sign your name with mine to protect and build upon the Affordable Care Act in the fight ahead? We need to reach 50,000 names.**
| [**SIGN THE PETITION >>**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319bb3/1cd0ac28/3b55b8b6/356b4a2d/1760887521/VEsF/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Protect-the-ACA?source=email-bsd-20190519ACA-b2_PET_ac_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190519ACA&utm_content=b2_PET_ac_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1")
---
Thanks, Peter. We have a lot of work to do.

_Joe_

|

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [**DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN ->**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319bb3/1cd0ac28/3b55b8b6/356b4a26/1760887521/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/29319bb3/1cd0ac28/3b55b8b6/356b4a28/1760887521/VEsHBA/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-email"). We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

subject: You haven't responded to our issues survey yet
body:
We're closing the survey at midnight.

**[Can you take a minute to complete our latest, official issues survey? We’ll compile the feedback and make sure Bernie gets the results.](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_issues_survey_may/?source=em190519-1-30&refcode2=1400.150750.1_vMgM&t=1&akid=1400%2E150750%2E1_vMgM)**
We're closing the survey tonight at midnight, and then we'll send the results to Bernie.
Thanks for adding your input.
\- Team Bernie

* * *

Friends -
Shortly after we launched our campaign, we sent around a survey to check in on the issues you’re paying the most attention to on this campaign.
We reviewed the results and shared them internally. And we’ve made sure that they’re reflected in the ideas we talk about online and on the trail.
But now that three months have passed since our launch, we thought it an especially important time to check back in to see if anything has changed.
The survey questions are the same, so your participation helps us track how people’s opinions have shifted over the course of our campaign. This helps us run a better campaign. **So please take a minute to sound off:**
**[Can you take a minute to complete our latest, official issues survey? We’ll compile the feedback and make sure Bernie gets the results.](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_issues_survey_may/?source=em190519-1-30&refcode2=1400.150750.1_vMgM&t=2&akid=1400%2E150750%2E1_vMgM)**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_issues_survey_may/?source=em190519-1-30&refcode2=1400.150750.1_vMgM&t=3&akid=1400%2E150750%2E1_vMgM)
**Here’s the first question:**
[](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_issues_survey_may/?source=em190519-1-30&refcode2=1400.150750.1_vMgM&t=4&akid=1400%2E150750%2E1_vMgM)
It wasn’t long ago that the issues and ideas we were talking about were considered too radical, and too extreme. Today, those are ideas are supported by the vast majority of the American people.
And that all starts with knowing the issues you care about, and coming up with solutions to address them.
So please, take a moment to tell us the issues your tracking on this campaign. Use this link:
[**https://act.berniesanders.com/go/survey**](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em_issues_survey_may/?source=em190519-1-30&refcode2=1400.150750.1_vMgM&t=5&akid=1400%2E150750%2E1_vMgM)
Thanks for answering this call to action.
All my best,
Faiz Shakir
Campaign Manager

name: Kirsten
subject: I want to share these photos with you from Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Peter, the abortion bans passed in Georgia, Alabama and Missouri over the past week represent the greatest threat to reproductive freedom in our lifetimes. I wanted to hear from the women most directly affected by these horrifying attacks--so I traveled to the Georgia State House on Thursday to speak with reproductive rights activists, state legislators and health care providers.
**This is about the fundamental question of whether we value women as human beings equal to anyone else.** Fighting for women's basic human rights is something we must never compromise on, and I'm proud to have made this issue a top priority of my campaign. I'll do the same in the White House.
Here are a few photos from the day--take a look, and if you can, **[I hope you'll consider making a contribution to my campaign tonight. I believe I'm the best candidate to fight for reproductive rights, and meeting with these activists in Georgia only reaffirmed my passion for this fight.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f977328/2ae112ef/68e258cf/357c7c1d/2896779478/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctYWxnYS1lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMzEzMi1mci1nZnAtbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-alga-email?refcode=jtk3132-fr-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
_First, we held a roundtable discussion led by Georgia State Rep. Dar 'shun Kendrick (standing). I carry a notebook with me everywhere I go so I can make note of the stories I hear, and I was deeply moved by the stories these women shared on Thursday._
_These brave leaders are on the frontlines of the fight in Georgia. From left to right: State Sen. Jen Jordan (District 6), State Rep. Bee Nguyen (District 89), NARAL Pro-Choice Georgia State Director Laura Simmons, State Rep. Dar 'shun Kendrick (District 93), me, State Sen. Nikema Williams (District 39) and State Rep. Sandra Scott (District 76). I'm so grateful they joined me._
_Then we headed into the rotunda of the state capitol with dozens of local activists who are keeping up the fight --no matter what._
_It was a powerful reminder of what we can accomplish when we stand together._
_One of our speakers was D r. Atsuko Koyama, an Atlanta-based pediatrician and abortion provider. She spoke about how the new Georgia law will affect her ability to care for her patients._
_Here, with activists from NARAL Pro-Choice Georgia._
I know that this struggle can be exhausting, heartbreaking and terrifying. It feels like we've been waging the same battle for our rights for years -- because we have been. But we cannot give up. We stand on the shoulders of the women and allies who've come before us. And we can win if we join together.
**So now 's our time to fight like hell. **This isn't just a fight for equality -- it's a fight for our lives. And it's one I refuse to lose.
My deep gratitude goes to all who joined us, and to everyone in this community who has shown your support for our movement over the past few days.
All my best,

--KG
